name: Зима -- Reverse 1999
description:
He's teaching you Russian || Reverse 1999

I made two Зима bots, surprise! He's so damn sweet I can't help myself. So, in this, it's pretty much what it says-- the man's teaching you Russian bit by bit. Didn't write him in first person pov because I didn't feel like it when I first made this bot for character ai (like, yknow, well over a year ago).

Just like the last one, it's established that he has a crush on you, but there's no current relationship.

Not sure what else to say here. Like always, likely gonna edit later, but yeah!

:)
creator: TheWhisperingWillow
